default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content refresh strategy and new performance dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Refresh Strategy:** Prioritize "vs." articles for GrowthX to update with new Bubble messaging and competitor features. Bubble will handle "how-to" guides, converting them to a video-first format on the `bubble.io/how-to-build` page.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Strategic Rationale:** This split leverages GrowthX's research tools for competitive analysis while using Bubble's internal resources for accurate, in-platform tutorials.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [**Looker Dashboard:** GrowthX's new Looker dashboard tracks content performance (GA4, GSC, SEMrush). A key goal is increasing the engaged session rate to \>50%.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [**Process Improvement:** GrowthX will add strategic comments to drafts, explaining the rationale (e.g., SEO, messaging) behind edits to improve Bubble's review process.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [**Prioritization:** GrowthX's Airtable audit (GSC, SEMrush data) will guide refresh priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [**"Vs." Articles (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Why:** Requires deep research into competitor feature sets, a task suited for GrowthX's tools (e.g., Perplexity AI).](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [**Goal:** Establish a quarterly refresh cadence to keep content current.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [**"How-to" Guides (Bubble):**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**Why:** Requires internal resources for accurate, in-platform screenshots and examples.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1036.0)
      - [**New Format:** Shift from outdated, screenshot-heavy guides to a video-first approach.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
          - [**Text:** General development principles.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
          - [**Video:** Embedded, Bubble-specific tutorial.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
      - [**Validation:** GrowthX will analyze SERPs to confirm the SEO viability of this format.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [**`bubble.io/how-to-build` Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Why:** This landing page for \~60 outdated tutorials needs a strategic decision.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [**Options:** Refresh relevant guides to the new video format or kill low-value pages.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
      - [**Timeline:** Refresh work can begin after the redesigned property editor enters beta in December.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### "How to Design a Great Website" Refresh

  - [**Purpose:** A test run to align an existing article with new Bubble messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [**Key Changes:**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**Structure:** Moved "web design trends" section to the top.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
      - [**SEO:** Condensed opening paragraphs after H2/H3s for better LLM visibility and skimmability.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [**Messaging:** Updated Bubble mentions and linked to the AI website generator.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
      - [**Completeness:** Added UX/page speed topics to match top-ranking content.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Integrations:** Mentioned Hotjar and Mixpanel as Bubble plugins for user testing.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [**Feedback:** Bubble requested strategic comments on future drafts to explain the rationale behind edits (e.g., SEO, messaging).](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)

### New Looker Dashboard

  - [**Purpose:** Track content performance using data from GA4, GSC, and SEMrush.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
  - [**Key Metrics:**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)
      - [**Engaged Sessions:** Sessions \>10s or with a scroll/click. Goal: \>50% of total sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)
      - [**Non-branded Clicks:** Traffic from non-brand queries; a key indicator of new content's SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1551.0)
      - [**LLM Referrals:** Traffic from AI sources (ChatGPT, Perplexity). The "best no-code app builder" post is the top performer.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1734.0)
  - [**Note:** The dashboard's GA4 conversion events are not used by Bubble's internal Segment-based tracking and can be ignored.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Aida (GrowthX):**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
      - [Deliver two new blog posts early next week.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
      - [Add strategic comments to future drafts explaining the rationale behind edits.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Analyze SERPs for "how-to" keywords to validate the video-first format.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
      - [Review the `bubble.io/how-to-build` page and its \~60 sub-pages to recommend a strategy (refresh vs. kill).](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
      - [Create a Notion doc summarizing Looker dashboard insights and goals.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [**Deedi (Bubble):**](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
      - [Provide GrowthX with the list of \~60 "how-to-build" URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
      - [Schedule a mid-engagement check-in with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/L22x642kfvmnmjefs8kRWue582vRmxkT?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
